untranslatable_reason: Measure Rule requires explicit calculation of formation height and trend-line price, which are chart pattern geometric properties that cannot be derived from the available OHLC indicators. The pattern needs manual identification of: (1) highest high within formation, (2) trend-line price level, and (3) formation height = highest_high - trend_line_price. Exit targets are then calculated as trend_line_price ± (formation_height / 2). This geometric measurement is beyond the scope of technical indicators and requires specialized pattern recognition logic outside the indicator-based framework.
